code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(input)
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 110
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut state = 0
mut j = 0
while j < count
  state = state + 1
  if state == 3
    state = 0
  end
  j = j + 1
end

match state
when 0
  println("Red")
when 1
  println("Green")
when _
  println("Yellow")
end
